items.text: US reinstates Strait of Hormuz blockade, 20% cargo toll effective 4pm ET; IMO says no legal basis for fee
OPEC trims 2026 demand growth forecast to 780k bpd, 3rd straight monthly cut even as Gulf output rebounds
EIA: gas storage builds 61 bcf vs 49 bcf expected; inventories now 6.6% above the 5-year average
Freeport LNG cuts feedgas intake for pretreatment/liquefaction maintenance running through late August
Sept rate-hike odds jump to ~77% ahead of CPI and Fed's Warsh testimony; 10Y yield near 2-month high 4.62%
